goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 receipt-backed promoted commit 协议

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 promoted receipt 协议
summary.what: 新增 receipt-backed promoted commit 协议：commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts 复用 promoted apply preflight，只接受外部/未来 accepted-memory writer 返回的 memory write receipt，要求 receipt.memoryId 匹配 proposedMemory.id；匹配后写入 catty_memory_canary_promotion_applies 审计记录，并把 catty_memory_canaries.status 从 promotable 更新为 promoted。新增 listMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts 与 --list-applied 只读 CLI；src/catty/README.md 同步说明该协议仍不包含真实 user memory writer。
summary.why: 前序切片已经能把 canary 走到 promotable 并预览 promoted apply side effects，但真实转正前还缺一个明确的提交边界。receipt-backed 协议让 Catty 只在未来 writer 已经给出 durable memory receipt 后记录自身审计和状态，避免把 promotion preview 或 judgement 直接写成长期用户记忆。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 receipt-backed promoted commit 协议

decisions.chose: commit 只消费 previewMemoryCanaryPromotionApply 得出的 ready plan 加外部 memory write receipt。
decisions.rationale: ready plan 已经证明 canary status=promotable、存在 persisted promotable decision 和 proposed memory；receipt 证明真实 writer 边界已在外部完成。
rejected: 在 commit 函数里重新计算 canary eval 或 promotion decision
让 commit 从 prediction/judgement 直接生成 memory

decisions.chose: 只写 catty_memory_canary_promotion_applies 和 canary promoted status，不写用户长期 memory、不写 catty_memory_audit。
decisions.rationale: Catty v0 需要推进真实 dogfood 状态机，但 user memory writer 仍是单独高风险边界；本轮只固定 receipt 和 Catty 状态的协议。

decisions.chose: CLI 只新增 --list-applied 只读入口，不提供 receipt commit 写入口。
decisions.rationale: receipt commit 需要未来 writer 明确提供 receipt；先保持程序化 API 可测，避免手动 CLI 误触发 promoted 状态。

rejected.alternative: 本轮实现真实 user memory writer
rejected.reason: 会越过用户长期 memory 写入边界，且当前仓库还没有经过设计和测试的 accepted-memory 写入路径。

rejected.alternative: 没有 receipt 也把 promotable 标记为 promoted
rejected.reason: 会把 canary/promotion preview 误当成已转正 memory，污染 dogfood 审计。

rejected.alternative: 把 promotion apply 写入 catty_memory_audit singleton
rejected.reason: 现有 catty_memory_audit 只是 accepted/rejected/trialHeuristics 聚合计数，无法保存 receipt、decision、proposed memory 和 evidence。

acknowledged_constraints.note: 本轮没有实现或调用真实用户长期 memory writer；receipt 只是外部写入证明。
commit 入口只接受已 promotable 的 canary 和 persisted promotable decision，不从 prediction/judgement 直接写 memory。
没有新增模型调用，也没有接 heartbeat/nightly runner。
CLAUDE.md 是既有无关 dirty，未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录。

review_notes: TDD RED：focused apply test 先失败于缺少 commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts。
验证：bun test src/catty/memory-canary*.test.ts，24 pass，185 expect。
验证：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，44 pass，297 expect。
CLI smoke：--help 输出新增 --list-applied；live --list-applied 返回 receipts=[]，只读且不创建测试状态。
验证：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 均通过。
live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，heartbeat installed/loaded，state=not running between cycles，last observe ok，full pipeline throttled 且上次 full pipeline ok。
提交 fe82a81 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-apply.test.ts、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-apply.ts、src/catty/memory-canary.ts；未 push、未开 PR。

subsystems: Catty v0 memory canary promoted apply commit
Catty v0 anti-drift memory admission boundary
architectural_claims: Catty v0 now has an explicit receipt-backed commit protocol after promoted apply preflight and before any real user memory writer.
Promoted state requires both a promotable canary plan and a matching durable memory receipt, not just a passing evaluation or preview.
Catty promotion apply audit is stored separately from catty_memory_audit because it needs receipt, decision, proposed memory and evidence detail.
Actual user memory writing remains intentionally unimplemented and must be supplied by a future accepted-memory writer.
behavioral_changes: commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts writes a receipt audit row and promotes canary status only when receipt.memoryId matches the preflight proposed memory id.
Ready canaries without a matching receipt are reported as blocked with missing_memory_write_receipt or receipt_memory_mismatch and are not mutated.
listMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts and --list-applied read prior apply receipts without creating tables when none exist.
promoteMemoryCanaryStatuses updates only promotable canaries to promoted, leaving planned/blocked/promoted rows unchanged.

data_model_changes.name: catty_memory_canary_promotion_applies
data_model_changes.location: SQLite DB selected by --store-db when commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts receives matching receipts
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Created lazily only when matching receipts are committed; --list-applied is missing-table safe and creates nothing.

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, ~/.agents/memory/config.json, model provider env vars, or payload_json are read or logged.
The new commit API requires an external receipt and does not itself write user memory or call model providers.
CLI remains read-only for promoted apply; write-protocol is only available as an explicit function for future controlled writer integration.
migration_notes: No destructive migration is required; the new apply receipt table is additive and created lazily.
Existing canary status schema already includes promoted; the new helper only updates rows currently in promotable status.
Existing promotion apply dry-run behavior is preserved.
